name: easy-tiktok-video-downloader
description: Download liked videos or any TikTok videos easily without watermark. Download search results, likes, all user videos, and more.
author: Arsene I. Muhire

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && webpack --config webpack.config.js --watch && du -sh dist
scripts.buildff: rm -rf distff && rm -f distff.zip && webpack --config webpack.firefox.config.js && du -sh distff && (cd distff && zip -r ../distff.zip . -x '__MACOSX/*' -x '.*' -x '*.zip')
scripts.build:prod: rm -rf dist && rm -f dist.zip && webpack --mode production --config webpack.config.js && du -sh dist && (cd dist && zip -r ../dist.zip . -x '__MACOSX/*' -x '.*' -x '*.zip')
scripts.buildff:prod: rm -rf distff && rm -f distff.zip && webpack --mode production --config webpack.firefox.config.js && du -sh distff && (cd distff && zip -r ../distff.zip . -x '__MACOSX/*' -x '.*' -x '*.zip')
